name: codex-token-balance
description: Adds Codex commands that summarize local token usage, session totals, observed plan metadata, and any rate-limit fields exposed by the CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect local Codex token usage and visible quota metadata
interface.longDescription: Adds slash-command style workflows and a local reporting script that parse ~/.codex session logs plus auth metadata to show per-session totals, recent usage, model breakdowns, and any rate-limit or credit fields that Codex exposes locally.
defaultPrompt: Show my recent Codex token usage and the latest visible quota fields
Break down Codex token usage by model across recent sessions
Explain which parts of Codex token balance are unavailable locally
